x.description: Length of life (in years) of a magnetron tube, following an exponential distribution with mean θ = 6.25 years. The answer uses this mean value directly in the computation e^{-5/6.25}.

warranty_period.description: Warranty period (in years) attached to the magnetron tube, used as the threshold value a = 5 in the probability calculation P(x ≤ 5).
